title: n8n UI shows Offline status after upgrade
symptom: After upgrading to version 2.7.0, the n8n UI displays an 'Offline' status, preventing publishing or saving changes. The interface also becomes sluggish and unresponsive.
root_cause: The issue arises from a bug in the health check endpoint configuration in versions 2.7.0 to 2.8.2, which causes the UI to misreport the service status as offline, blocking workflow publishing and causing performance issues.
fix_steps: Upgrade n8n to version 2.7.5 or later
Set the environment variable N8N_ENDPOINT_HEALTH to 'health' or any value other than 'healthz'
Update any health checks to reflect the new endpoint
agent_instruction: Upgrade to n8n version 2.7.5 and change the health check endpoint configuration.
